summary: A straight Fox & Friends news package about Sec. Noem's trip to Colombia and El Salvador, with a U.S.-Colombia biometric data-sharing agreement. Frames show standard Fox News chyrons ('NOEM MEETS WITH COLOMBIAN LEADERS ON IMMIGRATION', 'FOX & FRIENDS') over footage of Noem at a podium, walking past caged detainees, and a Fox anchor reporting live from Washington. Audio is the reporter's voiceover and Noem soundbites, not music. This is a recorded cable-news segment, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: NOEM MEETS WITH COLOMBIAN LEADERS ON IMMIGRATION; NOEM: WE'RE COMMITTED TO WORKING WITH COLOMBIA; NOEM VISITS EL SALVADOR PRISON DURING TRIP TO CENTRAL AND SOUTH AMERICA; FOX & FRIENDS
